target.description: Product, company, or vertical to research keywords for

verticals.description: Specific verticals to research (comma-separated), or 'infer' to pull from workspace GTM strategy or positioning data

intent.description: Focus on specific intent tiers: 'all' (bottom/mid/top funnel), 'bottom' (high-intent only), or 'content' (top-funnel for content marketing)

description: Research and structure keyword opportunities by vertical and intent tier — uses web search to find real keyword data, CPC estimates, and competition levels. Writes structured JSON for downstream use by advertising, launch-plan, and content strategy.
usage: keyword research, find keywords, search terms, SEO keywords, ad keywords, what people search for, PPC keywords, content keywords, search volume
